channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Small Businesses Struggle with High Borrowing Costs
item.description: Small and medium-sized businesses across Tanzania are facing severe financial challenges due to persistently high interest rates, which are making it difficult for entrepreneurs to access affordable c...

item.title: Federal judge blocks Trump administration policy limiting delivery of mail-in ballots after Election Day
item.description: A federal court has ruled against a Trump administration policy that sought to prevent the U.S. Postal Service from delivering mail-in ballots received after Election Day, finding the measure unlawful...

item.title: Canada Proposes Shifting Nuclear Project Assessments to Canadian Nuclear Safety Commission
item.description: A blog post from nuclear-news.net criticizes recent Canadian federal government initiatives aimed at streamlining and promoting nuclear power development. The article highlights five key announcements...

item.title: Ammonia gas removal operation continues at Tiruvallur factory after 18 worker deaths
item.description: The process of removing ammonia gas from St. Peter and Paul Pvt. Ltd., a seafood processing unit in Tiruvallur district, will continue on Monday. A toxic gas leak on June 21 caused 18 worker deaths an...

item.title: Minions & Monsters narrowly edges out Toy Story 5 at Fourth of July box office
item.description: The animated film 'Minions & Monsters' achieved a modest victory at the Fourth of July box office, securing the top spot with minimal margin over its competitor 'Toy Story 5'. Released on July 5, 2026...

item.title: Uta Uchida Makes Acting Debut as the Antagonist in Netflix Sci-Fi Thriller 'Human Vapor'
item.description: The news article highlights the rising attention on UTA, a Japanese model turned actor, who is making his acting debut in the highly anticipated Japanese-South Korean co-production sci-fi crime thrill...

item.title: Poilievre addresses separatism and emphasizes Canadian unity during speech to Conservative supporters
item.description: Conservative Party of Canada Leader Pierre Poilievre addressed supporters in Calgary, focusing part of his remarks on the issue of separatism and national unity. In his speech, Poilievre responded to ...

item.title: Somali Security Forces Eliminate Al-Shabaab Commander in Basra Village
item.description: Somali security forces have successfully eliminated a senior Al-Shabaab commander during an operation in Basra Village, marking a significant blow to the terrorist group's leadership. The operation, c...

item.title: Censorship and Cuts: The Controversial Film 'Satluj' Faces Removal from Zee5
item.description: The film 'Satluj,' based on extra-judicial killings and enforced disappearances by the Punjab police in the 1990s, was removed from the Zee5 streaming platform days after its release. Directed by Hone...

item.title: Mallory McMorrow suspends Michigan Democratic Senate primary campaign, leaving a two-candidate contest
item.description: Michigan state senator Mallory McMorrow has suspended her campaign for the Democratic nomination for the United States Senate seat in Michigan, reducing the primary contest to two remaining candidates...

item.title: Lionel Richie recupera salud tras incidente durante concierto
item.description: Lionel Richie, el famoso músico de 77 años, informó a sus seguidores que se encuentra bien después de un episodio de vértigo que obligó a cancelar varios conciertos. El incidente ocurrió durante su gi...

item.title: Tanzania's Government Strengthens Cooperatives for Economic Growth
item.description: Tanzania's government has pledged to accelerate reforms in the cooperative sector, positioning it as a cornerstone of the nation's economic transformation strategy. The reforms include enhancing gover...

item.title: Lagos government warns against spreading misleading flood images
item.description: The Lagos State Government has accused social media influencers and bloggers of circulating misleading flood images from other locations and falsely attributing them to Lagos. Commissioner Tokunbo Wah...

item.title: France Advances to Last Eight After Narrow Win Over Paraguay, Morocco Defeats Canada in World Cup 2026
item.description: In a dramatic World Cup 2026 clash, France secured a 1-0 victory over Paraguay in Philadelphia, with Kylian Mbappé converting a penalty in the 70th minute to seal the win. The match, played under extr...

item.title: Gold Theft in Sivakasi: Masked Robbers Break Into Businessman's Home
item.description: Three masked men stole over 90 sovereigns of gold from the residence of businessman Sri Aravind Ram in Sivakasi on Saturday night. The family returned home around 11:30 p.m. to find the main gate brok...

item.title: Americans Opt for Regular Gasoline to Save Costs Amid High Prices
item.description: A growing number of U.S. drivers are switching from premium gasoline to regular to save money, despite the latter being less optimal for high-performance vehicles. Data from fuel cash-back app Upside ...

item.title: Harry Styles concludes historic 12-night Wembley residency with Pride celebration and special appearance by Gemma Styles
item.description: Harry Styles brought the London leg of his 'Together, Together' residency tour to a close on 4 July with the twelfth and final performance at Wembley Stadium, setting a new record for the most shows p...

item.title: Australia wins T20 Women's World Cup against England
item.description: Australia secured their seventh T20 Women's World Cup title with a commanding seven-wicket victory over England at a sold-out Lord's. The final showcased a one-sided performance, with Australia's domi...

item.title: Alex Eala to Compete in Wimbledon Round of 16 at PhilSports Arena on July 6, 2026
item.description: The article announces a free public viewing event for Filipino tennis star Alex Eala's Wimbledon Round of 16 match against Jasmine Paolini, scheduled for July 6, 2026, at the PhilSports Arena in Pasig...

item.title: Nueva Vizcaya grants ₱50,000 incentive to couples married for 50 years or more
item.description: The provincial government of Nueva Vizcaya has awarded ₱50,000 each to at least 200 couples who have reached 50 years of marriage, as part of its “Enduring Devotion” program. The initiative aims to re...
